name: Adobe Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the crumbled cookie crumbs, melted butter, and Amaretto.
2. Press the mixture into a buttered pie pan to form a pie shell.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Bake the pie crust for 6-8 minutes. Allow it to cool completely.
5. Freeze the cooled crust for an additional 15 minutes, or until firm.
6. Spread vanilla ice cream evenly over the bottom of the crust and freeze for another 15 minutes, or until firm.
7. Spread coffee ice cream evenly on top of the vanilla ice cream.
8. Sprinkle chocolate shavings over the top and freeze again.
Note: This recipe is from "Simply Simpatico" by the Junior League of Albuquerque as printed in their local newspaper.
